overall.description: A first-person walk through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning on a neon-lit sidewalk, crossing a street, ascending stairs to a pedestrian overpass, and continuing through the elevated corridor with views of the city below.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward a busy intersection with bright neon signage

entered.detail: gray concrete pavement with scattered debris and paper
dark building facade with green accent panels
tall vertical neon sign with red and white lettering
large red hexagonal neon sign mounted on building
modern street lamp post with horizontal light fixture

segments.scene_description: Walking along a neon-lit city sidewalk at night, with the Kabuki district signage visible ahead. The street is relatively quiet with a few pedestrians, and the concrete pavement is littered with debris. Buildings line the left side while the street opens to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and stair entrance

events.description: stepping off the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk
white truck passes through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and approaching the stairwell entrance to the pedestrian overpass

notable_agents.action: white truck driving through the intersection

entered.detail: dark asphalt road with white and yellow crosswalk stripes
concrete stairwell entrance leading upward to overpass
large illuminated advertisement screen showing product imagery
modern glass facade building with interior lighting visible

segments.scene_description: Crossing the city street at night, moving from the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk. A white truck passes by on the left as the camera approaches a concrete stairwell entrance. The Kabuki neon sign recedes into the background while new digital billboards become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell ascending to pedestrian overpass

events.description: entering the covered stairwell from the open street
reaching the top of the stairs and entering the overpass level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs following other pedestrians into the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright purple pants climbing stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with scattered flyers and debris
smooth concrete walls with horizontal yellow safety stripes
long horizontal fluorescent light fixtures mounted on walls
metal handrails along the stairwell walls
concrete platform at the top of the stairs leading to corridor

segments.scene_description: Ascending the concrete stairwell into the pedestrian overpass, transitioning from the neon-lit street to an artificially lit enclosed space. The stairs are flanked by concrete walls with fluorescent lighting, and other pedestrians are climbing ahead toward the upper landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with city views through windows

events.description: emerging from stairwell into elevated walkway with window openings overlooking the street
structural columns briefly block the view of the street below

agents.ego_description: walking through the overpass corridor with views of the city street visible through side windows

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: wide concrete pedestrian walkway with overhead cover
large rectangular openings in the wall overlooking the street below
tall buildings with neon signage visible through the windows
palm trees visible outside the overpass windows
smooth concrete barrier along the window openings

segments.scene_description: Walking through the elevated pedestrian overpass with teal-colored artificial lighting. Large window openings on the right reveal views of the city street below, palm trees, and distant neon-lit buildings. The corridor is populated with other pedestrians moving in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed pedestrian corridor with vending machines

events.description: passing by a vending machine and scattered debris on the floor

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dimly lit interior corridor of the overpass, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: narrow concrete hallway with solid walls and no windows
illuminated vending machine with REAL WATER branding
metal barred windows or grates on the left wall
scattered trash and paper littering the concrete floor
opening at the end of the corridor leading to another area

segments.scene_description: Continuing through a more enclosed section of the pedestrian overpass with no exterior views. The corridor features a vending machine on the right, metal grates on the left wall, and debris scattered on the floor. The lighting remains artificial with a blue-green hue as the path leads toward a distant doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty, neon-lit city sidewalk into the sterile, artificial confines of an elevated pedestrian overpass. It begins by moving along a debris-strewn pavement in the Kabuki district, before transitioning across an asphalt street as a white truck passes by. As the camera reaches the opposite side, the scene shifts from the open night air into a concrete stairwell, ascending through fluorescent lighting toward an upper landing. The path then opens into a wide corridor bathed in teal light, where large windows reveal views of palm trees and the city below, before finally narrowing into an enclosed section featuring metal grates and a vending machine.
